title: Silly Game
description: A five-level roguelike dungeon crawl. Fight monsters, collect gold, find equipment, and descend the final staircase to escape.

title: Minimal Dungeon
description: A minimal room to prove the engine pipeline works

title: Interact Demo
description: Exercises interaction flows, tile hooks, and the UI panel DSL

title: Toy Hit and Heal
description: Two beings — a puncher and a healer — with three actions for e2e testing
